fields.name: Row No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a number that identifies the line.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the VAT report statement.

fields.name: Box No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number on the box that the VAT statement applies to.

fields.name: Base
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that the VAT amount in the amount is calculated from.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the entry in the report statement.

fields.name: Note
fields.tooltip: Specifies any text that you want to add to the specific line.
